{
    "views": [
        {
            "view": "projects_with_revision",
            "definition": " SELECT p.id,\n    p.user_id,\n    p.name,\n    p.standard,\n    p.status,\n    p.created_at,\n    p.updated_at,\n    p.updated_by,\n    p.current_open_revision_id,\n    p.current_draft_revision_id,\n    ro.pfd_rev AS open_pfd_rev,\n    ro.pfmea_rev AS open_pfmea_rev,\n    ro.pcp_rev AS open_pcp_rev,\n    COALESCE((((((ro.pfd_rev)::text || '.'::text) || (ro.pfmea_rev)::text) || '.'::text) || (ro.pcp_rev)::text), '0.0.0'::text) AS open_revision_label,\n    rd.pfd_rev AS draft_pfd_rev,\n    rd.pfmea_rev AS draft_pfmea_rev,\n    rd.pcp_rev AS draft_pcp_rev,\n    COALESCE((((((rd.pfd_rev)::text || '.'::text) || (rd.pfmea_rev)::text) || '.'::text) || (rd.pcp_rev)::text), NULL::text) AS draft_revision_label,\n    p.organization_id,\n    p.site_department_id,\n    p.products\n   FROM ((projects p\n     LEFT JOIN process_revisions ro ON ((ro.id = p.current_open_revision_id)))\n     LEFT JOIN process_revisions rd ON ((rd.id = p.current_draft_revision_id)));"
        }
    ],
